role_summary: Civil rights movement participant; co-subject of a joint oral history with her husband David Mercer Ackerman (catalog entry 135, ingestion-only tier).
ai_reading: Satoko Ito Ackerman shares the embedding signature of the joint oral history at entry 135 (catalog slug 'david-mercer-ackerman-and-satoko-ito-ackerman'); see that catalog page for the substrate-derived neighbor cluster and axis observations the embedding produces for the combined transcript. Individual cosines for each named subject of a joint interview are not separable from the precomputed substrate, since the LoC transcript was recorded as a single audio file with multiple voices interleaved.
biographical_paragraph: Satoko Ito Ackerman is one of the named subjects of the joint Civil Rights History Project oral history at entry 135 (American Folklife Center accession AFC 2010/039) [src: 1]. This catalog page exists as a per-person index for Satoko Ito Ackerman; the substrate signature lives on the parent joint-interview page (see the AI's reading above) since the LoC transcript treats the joint conversation as a single recording. Independent biographical sourcing for Satoko Ito Ackerman is pending.

sources.title: Joint oral history at entry 135
